title: Control Plus
description: With name and key recognition modes, it adds a powerful search bar to the control menu and a keyboard indicator panel showing which assignment is assigned to which key.
body:
**Controls Plus** makes one of the most frustrating parts of Minecraft much easier. It adds a functional search bar to the keyboard bindings panel with two unique modes:

**Name Mode:** Search for specific keybindings by typing their names directly.

**Key Mode:** Simply press a key on your keyboard to see which action it is currently assigned to.

Stop scrolling through endless menus to find your keys! For more details, you can check the images or download the mod to try it out yourself.
